markdownRemark.html:
These are my lecture notes from the Quantum Mechanics II course taught by Prof. Zhixin Qian during the 2020 Summer School at Peking University.

  • Chapter 1: Phase in quantum mechanics
  • Chapter 2: Path integral formalism of quantum mechanics
  • Chapter 3: The WKB approximation
  • Chapter 4: Rotation and vibration of molecules
  • Chapter 5: Variation principle
  • Chapter 6: Introduction to many-body theory
